Event: The Animated Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 03/07/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI339
Hidden Shuriken Ring

Once in a while, the fighter deals 3 random enemy fighters 700000 physical damage and marks them for 4 seconds. During this time, when the marked fighter uses a weapon, ring, or artifact ability, 2 random positive effects are removed from them, and all parameters are reduced by 10% for 5 seconds. A maximum of 6 effects.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌚🌚🌚
